name: Modify User Preferences Performance Test — PATCH /api/v1/users/{user_id}/preferences
description: Validate partial updates to user preferences via PATCH /api/v1/users/{user_id}/preferences under concurrent load, ensuring p95 response time and error rate meet targets, and that updates are reflected when preferences are retrieved via a subsequent GET.
corresponding NFR: Modify User Preferences (Partial Update) — PATCH /api/v1/users/{user_id}/preferences must achieve p95 ≤ 400 ms for 95% of requests, error rate < 1%, simulate 50 concurrent PATCH operations, and changes must be visible via subsequent GET (Update Reflection).
preconditions: User accounts must be pre-created and accessible.
Ensure valid auth tokens are used in the Authorization header.
Preferences must be enabled in the application.

input data.update_reflection_check: After each PATCH, perform a subsequent GET for the same user_id and verify the updated preference fields match the PATCH payload.

notes: Defaults applied where required to complete load profile: duration_s=300 and think_time_s=[1,3]. Update Reflection is validated by a subsequent GET read after each PATCH and comparing fields to the PATCH payload.
